case_title: QUEENS SF, LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY PARTNERSHIP ET AL VS. NICOLE DOBARRO

docket_entries.description: LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, OCT-21-2024 HEARING HELD RE: APPELLANTS QUEENS SF, LLC, AND EDWARD KIM'S MOTION FOR WAIVER OF BOND REQUIREMENT UNDER CAL. LABOR CODE SECTION 98.2. THE COURT TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: S. KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU) ***** AFTER THE HEARING, THE COURT SIGNS AN ORDER DENYING APPELLANTS QUEENS SF, LLC AND EDWARD KIM'S MOTION FOR WAIVER OF BOND REQUIREMENT. (SEE SIGNED ORDER FOR COMPLETE RULING.) (302/RBU) *****

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Waiver Of Bond Requirement Under Cal. Labor Code Section 98.2; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Oct-21-2024 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. ANGIE L. GUEVARA, Esq. of DeVito Law Group (Tel: 415-888-8215) for Plaintiff/Respondent Nicole Dobarro;
Atty. MARIE TRIMBLE HOLVICK, Esq. of Gordon Rees Scully Mansukhani, LLP (Tel: 415-986-5900) for Defendants/Appellants Queens SF, LLC and Edward Kim.

HEARING RE: APPELLANTS QUEENS SF, LLC, and EDWARD KIM's Motion For Waiver Of Bond Requirement Under Cal. Labor Code Section 98.2.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
